rationale: No new qualitative developments for Romania — Iran deal uncertainty continues to weigh on energy costs, Ukraine war remains background noise.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump claims Sunday signing, Tehran contradicts
top_events.summary: Unresolved Iran deal keeps energy price uncertainty alive for Romania, which is sensitive to gas and oil costs. No relief in sight yet.

top_events.title: Ukraine keeps targeting Russian energy infrastructure
top_events.summary: Ukraine's strikes on Russian energy terminals are a continuation of war dynamics near Romania's border — no new escalation but Black Sea security remains a background concern.

top_events.title: EU migration rules debate ongoing
top_events.summary: EU-wide migration policy discussion has mild relevance for Romania given its border position and exposure to migration flows from eastern neighbors.
